name: HighKing
short_description: Overworked drone, conquer your nightmare ascent! The path is brutally steep and agonizingly long. But take heart! At least for this climb, you've got hands and feet.
detailed_description:
Overview

"I can't take another step..." You've collapsed from the crushing daily grind.

Your consciousness fades, and darkness envelops your vision. And then, you find yourself before a towering mountain.

"I said I couldn't walk another step, but I never said I couldn't climb."

And so begins your long and arduous ascent.

But don't worry. After all, you can use your hands and feet for this climb!

Controls

Uses mouse input only.

Drag your limbs to scale the treacherous mountain.

If you let go with both hands, you'll fall.

Your feet can't grip rocks, but you can convert their pushing power into climbing force.

Features

  • Highly intuitive, standard climbing style.

  • Invite friends and encourage each other as you climb together.

  • Save up in-game currency to purchase a variety of avatars from the shop.

  • Choose your favorite from over 100 avatars!

Streaming Guidelines

  • Individuals and corporations alike may stream this game without needing prior permission.

  • Monetization is only permitted using the features provided by the video streaming platform.

  • We request that you include the game's name in the title of your videos/streams and a link to our Steam page in the description.

  • Furthermore, we assume no responsibility for any damages incurred as a result of streaming this game.

  • These guidelines are subject to change without prior notice.
